name: Oatmeal Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over oats. Add margarine. Cover and let stand 20 minutes.
2. In a large bowl, mix together all the sugars, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, baking powder, flour, and eggs until well combined.
3. Pour the batter into an oblong cake pan lined with parchment paper. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Remove from oven and immediately mix together the topping ingredients: margarine, chopped pecans, vanilla extract, brown sugar, evaporated milk, and coconut in a small bowl.
5. Spread the topping evenly over the warm cake.
6. Place under the broiler (gas mark 7 or broil setting) until the topping is lightly browned and crispy. Watch carefully to prevent burning.
Another yummy one!
